description_long: This is a sleek, modern electric car with a bright red exterior and a streamlined, aerodynamic shape. The vehicle features a panoramic glass roof, flush door handles, and large alloy wheels, all contributing to its contemporary design. The front end is characterized by a smooth, grille-less fascia with a subtle emblem, while the rear is rounded and minimalistic, lacking visible exhaust pipes. The side profile reveals four doors and a gently sloping roofline, enhancing its sporty yet practical appearance. The windows are tinted, and the interior appears to have two rows of seats with a minimalist dashboard. The car's overall design is consistent with high-end electric vehicles commonly seen in urban environments.
description: A bright red, modern electric car with a panoramic glass roof, flush door handles, and a streamlined, aerodynamic body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smooth, grille-less fascia, subtle emblem, and panoramic glass roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, flush handles, alloy wheels, and sloping roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded trunk, minimalistic rear design, and absence of exhaust pipes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same door and wheel features with clear glass roof.
